item.title: Eastern Conference Standings ()
item.description: Eastern Conference Standings () --------------------- Carolina Hurricanes – 86 pts (0.455) Buffalo Sabres – 84 pts (0.438) Tampa Bay Lightning – 82 pts (0.441) Detroit Red Wings – 79 pts (0.411) Montreal Canadiens – 78 pts (0.419) Pittsburgh Penguins – 78 pts (0.413) New York Islanders – 77 pts (0.401) Boston Bruins – 76 pts (0.402) Columbus Blue Jackets – 74 pts (0.392) Ottawa Senators – 73 pts (0.386) Washington Capitals – 71 pts (0.364) Philadelphia Flyers – 69 pts (0.365) New Jersey Devils – 66 pts (0.344) Florida Panthers – 65 pts (0.344) Toronto Maple Leafs – 65 pts (0.339) New York Rangers – 58 pts (0.307) ---------------------

item.title: Western Conference Standings ()
